completedNarrative: Congratulations! You have completed all major relocation tasks. Ask Haru in chat anytime.
stepMarkComplete: Mark this task complete in Haru when done
greetingBody: This is your personal action plan from Haru — for you studying at {school_name} in {location}. You have completed {completed}/{total} steps. Focus on “What to do now” below; you do not need to read everything at once.
pdfAllDone: You have finished all major steps. Return to Haru chat if anything new comes up.
pdfPathIntro: Overview of what remains on your route. For now, focus only on the section above.
pdfFooter: This plan was generated by Haru for you personally, based on your progress.
mockStep2Hours: Check nearest office hours in {loc} (weekday mornings)
mockStep4Complete: Mark complete in Haru when done
quizNoQuestions: No diagnostic questions needed — your progress looks good!
quizIntro: I'll ask up to {n} multiple-choice questions to clarify your situation.
quizDoneHeader: Diagnosis complete! Here's what I recommend based on your answers:
quizDoneDefault: Your situation matches your roadmap progress. Continue with your current focus task.
chipSuggestionsDefault: How do I do this step?||I have a problem
